name: Vegemillet Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a large pot on medium heat and add oil.
2. When the oil is hot, add millet and cayenne. Stir for 2-3 minutes until the millet gives off a nut-like fragrance.
3. Add boiling salted water and reduce the heat to simmer. Simmer, covered, for 35-40 minutes, adding vegetables 5 minutes before the end.
4. Add flours to millet and vegetables, mixing well to avoid lumps. Let mixture sit for 15-20 minutes until cool enough to handle.
5. Heat oil about 1/8 inch deep in a frying pan on medium-low heat.
6. Form millet mixture into thick patties with hands or press into shape with a pancake turner.
7. Fry for 3-4 minutes on each side or until crispy and lightly browned.
8. Serve with soy sauce or your favorite sauce or gravy. Makes 18 to 20 burgers.
